news.summary: Montreal, July 2, 2025 - Today, Theratechnologies Inc. announced a significant deal with CB Biotechnology, LLC, an affiliate of Future Pak, LLC. The agreement entails the acquisition of all outstanding common shares of Theratechnologies for US$3.01 per share in cash, along with a contingent value right (CVR) per share that could result in additional cash payments of up to US$1.19 per CVR upon meeting specific milestones. The total value of the transaction, including potential CVR payments, amounts to a substantial US$254 million. Theratechnologies, a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, is recognized on the TSX as TH and on the NASDAQ as THTX.
news.headline: Theratechnologies to be acquired by CB Biotechnology for $3.01/share + $1.19 per CVR, totaling $254 million.

news.summary: KIOXIA, based in San Jose, California, has recently announced an update to its AiSAQ™ software. The new version, known as All-in-Storage ANNS with Product Quantization, aims to enhance storage solutions for customers. This update is part of KIOXIA's ongoing efforts to improve its software offerings.
news.headline: KIOXIA updates AiSAQ software for AI RAG with new version of Vector Search Library in San Jose.

news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California, on July 2, 2025, Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) released a statement regarding the removal of U.S. export restrictions on China. The company received a letter from the U.S. Bureau of Industry and Security on the same day.
news.headline: Synopsys announces statement on US lifting export restrictions on China; received letter on July 2.

news.summary: In Ningbo, China, on July 2, 2025, an important development in global heterojunction (HJT) photovoltaic technology was announced. Risen Energy Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 300118) revealed that their Hyper-ion HJT modules have reached an impressive milestone with an average mass-production power of 740Wp. This achievement marks a significant advancement in the field, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation in renewable energy solutions.
news.headline: Risen Energy produces breakthrough HJT modules with 740Wp and 26.61% efficiency, a global milestone.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of July 2, 2025, it has been reported that the market for probiotics in animal feed is expected to grow significantly. The market, currently valued at USD 5.40 billion in 2025, is forecasted to reach USD 8.27 billion by 2030. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.9% during the specified forecast period. These projections were outlined in a report released by MarketsandMarkets™.
news.headline: Probiotics in animal feed market to reach $8.27 billion by 2030, $5.40 billion in 2025, CAGR 8.9%.

news.summary: Telegram has recently rolled out new features including checklists and suggested posts, aiming to improve task management and monetization capabilities within channels. These enhancements provide both creators and users on the platform with increased opportunities. The addition of these tools brings a solution for more efficient management and revenue generation within the Telegram community.
news.headline: New features on Telegram: checklists & suggested posts. Enhancing channel monetization with tools for task management, benefitting creators & users.

news.summary: Riot Platforms has disclosed a decrease in their ownership in Bitfarms Ltd., currently possessing 12.3% of the company following the sale of more than 2.8 million shares. This decision is in line with Riot's ongoing strategic investment evaluation.
news.headline: Riot Platforms lowers Bitfarms stake to 12.3%, sells 2.8M shares as part of strategic investment review.

news.summary: The Goodwill Alliance has successfully decreased sandwich attacks on BNB Chain, leading to a safer trading space. They have implemented effective strategies to combat malicious Miner Extractable Value (MEV) threats. Learn more about their tactics and upcoming initiatives to address this issue.
news.headline: Goodwill Alliance cuts sandwich attacks on BNB Chain, making trading safer with fewer incidents. Learn more about their strategies and future plans to combat malicious MEV.

news.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on July 30. Along with this disclosure, the company will also introduce fresh cryptocurrency offerings, consisting of stock tokens and a Layer 2 blockchain.
news.headline: Robinhood to reveal Q2 2025 results on July 30, including new crypto features like stock tokens & Layer 2 blockchain.

news.summary: A major development in the fight against global cybercrime has occurred as the U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has placed sanctions on Aeza Group. This action was taken due to Aeza Group's involvement in providing hosting services that enable ransomware attacks and other cybercriminal activities. The move is a significant step in targeting the infrastructure that supports cybercrime on a global scale.
news.headline: US OFAC sanctions Aeza Group for aiding cybercrime via hosting services, targeting ransomware. Major step against global cybercrime.
